prestazioni: Engine: Skyactiv-G 1.5L (P5-VPS) or 2.0L (PE-VPS) naturally aspirated inline-4 with forged internals upgrade (JE Pistons 87.5mm forged slugs, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL Race Series bearings) and ported/polished cylinder head with oversized Ferrea intake/exhaust valves (1mm larger than OEM) and Supertech dual valve springs for 8,500 RPM reliability

Forced induction: Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) with custom 3D-printed titanium exhaust manifold (designed by Full-Race Motorsports) and TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegate, paired with a GReddy intercooler (525x225x76mm core) and custom 3-inch aluminum charge piping with silicone couplers from Vibrant Performance

Fuel system: Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors, Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator (FPR), and AEM 340lph external pump with -6AN PTFE lines, controlled by a Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU with flex-fuel sensor and individual cylinder tuning capability
estetica: Chassis: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (ND-specific, 30mm wider front fenders, 40mm wider rear) with custom carbon fiber overfenders (made by Seibon Carbon) and relocated rear bumper support for aggressive stance, paired with Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (15x9 +20 front, 15x10 +25 rear) and Nitto NT01 tires (225/45/15 front, 245/40/15 rear)

Aerodynamics: Custom 9 Lives Racing front splitter (ND-specific, 3D-scanned for perfect fitment) with adjustable canards (3 per side) and a custom carbon fiber duckbill rear spoiler (designed by APR Performance, 120mm tall) with integrated third brake light, paired with a Cusco underbody diffuser (ND-specific, 3-piece carbon fiber)

Interior: Bride Zeta III reclinable bucket seats (ND-specific mounting brackets) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub (ND-specific adapter), and a custom roll cage (designed by Hard Dog Motorsports, 8-point bolt-in with integrated harness bars and gusseted rear legs for chassis rigidity)
